[32m[Common][0m

  [36mraw                             [0m - Print last raw sample

[32m[Operating Mode][0m
  [36mmode [single|periodic|art]      [0m - Set or show operating mode

  [36mstop_periodic                   [0m - Stop periodic or ART mode
  [36mrepeat [low|med|high]           [0m - Set or show repeatability
  [36mrate [0.5|1|2|4|10]             [0m - Set or show periodic rate
  [36mstretch [0|1]                   [0m - Set or show clock stretching

[32m[Status And Alerts][0m
  [36mstatus                          [0m - Read status register
  [36mstatus_restore                  [0m - Read status with periodic/ART restore snapshot
  [36mstatus_raw                      [0m - Read raw status (16-bit)

  [36mheater [on|off|status]          [0m - Control heater
  [36mserial [stretch|nostretch]      [0m - Read serial number

  [36mcommand read <cmd> <len>        [0m - Issue a command and read raw response bytes
  [36malert show                      [0m - Read all alert limits
  [36malert set <kind> <T> <RH>       [0m - Alias for alert write
  [36malert read <hs|hc|lc|ls>        [0m - Read alert limit
  [36malert write <kind> <T> <RH>     [0m - Write alert limit
  [36malert raw read <kind>           [0m - Read raw alert limit word
  [36malert raw write <kind> <hex>    [0m - Write raw alert limit word
  [36malert encode <T> <RH>           [0m - Encode alert limit word
  [36malert decode <hex>              [0m - Decode alert limit word
  [36malert disable                   [0m - Disable alerts (LowSet > HighSet)

[32m[Lifecycle And Diagnostics][0m

  [36monline                          [0m - Show online state
